hypothesis: Computationally efficient EMD metrics calculated over DFT-derived band gaps will exhibit stronger correlation with simulation-based stability metrics (RMSD and SUN) than EMD metrics calculated over ML-predicted formation energies, because band gaps are more sensitive to subtle changes in atomic coordination and electronic structure that accompany structural instability, making them a more physically discriminative distributional descriptor for evaluating generative model performance without requiring full DFT relaxation.
